title: Q-Ready 25: Quantum-Security Horizons Conference
summary: CERT.LV announcement for the Q-Ready 25 conference covering quantum key distribution (QKD) and post-quantum (quantum-safe) cryptography (PQC), with attention to quantum-safe infrastructure under the EuroQCI initiative.

title: Cryptography Secure Against Quantum Computers (presentation)
summary: Presentation hosted on CERT.LV's events area surveying post-quantum cryptography methods (lattice-based such as NTRU/LWE, code-based such as McEliece, and multivariate-quadratic schemes). Authored by an academic researcher rather than CERT.LV itself, so flagged for human review.
